commands.review_summary:
The PR clears a resumed Codex app-server context-engine thread binding after a terminal context-window overflow and adds regression coverage for that async failure path.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +76. Total +97 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main handles synchronous turn/start context-window overflow on resumed context-engine threads, while terminal turn/completed failures flow through finalPromptError without clearing the stale binding.
